vehicle.model_designation_position: front, lower right (from viewer's perspective; below headlight)

composition.important_crop_information: top of cab, bumper, headlights, and license plate fully visible; some pavement and part of adjacent building and greenery in background

company_identity.position: front of cab, above windshield, horizontal orientation (letters upright when vehicle is upright)
front grille, vertically centered, horizontal orientation (letters upright when vehicle is upright)
company_identity.appearance: large white uppercase letters, placed vertically along the grille

owner_signatures.position: lower center of front windshield, horizontal orientation

owner_signatures.text_or_element: grille badge with Scania griffin logo
owner_signatures.position: center top of grille, above 'SCANIA' lettering
on both lower left and lower right sides of grille (from viewer's perspective)

roof_lights.position: along the top edge of the cab, spaced evenly left to right, following the front curve

grille_lights.position: integrated into the front grille, two groups of three (left, center, right), vertically aligned within the grille slots

main_headlights.position: two on each side of the lower front, integrated into the bumper (stacked vertically by pair, left and right sides)

windshield_contents: Dodge sticker, blue/white script style, center lower windshield
stuffed animal/toy on passenger side dashboard
decorative curtain/border with white scalloped edge and red trim along upper windshield edge

front_geometry.grille_description: black mesh with five wide horizontal silver bars, grille split into several vertical segments with orange lights embedded
front_geometry.headlight_description: two-part units each side (left/right); each unit consists of two main lamps in stacked vertical layout, clear lens, integrated with bumper
front_geometry.bumper_description: dark color, streamlined design with rectangular license plate holder in center, headlights integrated into far left and right sections

do_not_move: Scania griffin badge center-top of grille
do_not_invent: company details not visible on vehicle
